name: App_Cisco_Audit_Resources
query:
SELECT BuildingID 'Key' , LongName 'Name', 'Building' 'Type'
FROM f_App_Cisco_List_Buildings
UNION

SELECT ID 'Key' , RoomName 'Name', 'Room' 'Type'
FROM f_App_Cisco_List_Rooms
UNION


SELECT UUID 'Key' , Description 'Name', 'Phone' 'Type'
FROM f_App_Cisco_List_Phones
UNION



SELECT uuid 'Key' , label 'Name', 'Phone Line' 'Type'
FROM f_App_Cisco_List_PhoneLines
